library.title: Library
library.noLibraryHint: Add an OPDS catalog in Settings to browse your books.
library.emptyDownloaded: Nothing downloaded yet — tap the cloud icon on a book.
library.emptyCatalog: No books found in this catalog
library.offlineBanner: Offline — on-device books stay bright; others are dimmed

downloads.removeMessage: "{{title}}" will be deleted from this device. Reading progress is kept.
downloads.removeAllMessage: {{count}} books ({{size}}) will be deleted from this device.
downloads.storageFooter: Removing downloads frees space on this device. Books stay in your OPDS catalog.
downloads.errorAuth: Authentication failed. Check your OPDS username and password in Settings.
downloads.errorForbidden: Access denied. This account may not have permission to download this book.
downloads.errorNotFound: Download link not found on the server.
downloads.errorOpds: Could not read the book details from your OPDS server.
downloads.errorNoLink: No EPUB download link in the OPDS feed for this book.
downloads.errorTransport: Download failed due to a device networking issue. Try again.

reader.unsupportedFormat: This format is not supported yet
reader.appearanceFooter: Sepia and light themes follow common e-reader conventions. Dark matches the app shell.
reader.publisherStylesHint: Keep the book's original typography when available

settings.title: OPDS Servers
settings.listFooter: Tap a library to open it in your catalog. Use the arrow to edit its URL or credentials.
settings.emptyServers: No libraries connected yet. Add an OPDS server to get started.
settings.serverFooter: Credentials are stored securely on this device only.
settings.showIntroAgainFooter: Replay the welcome screens. Your library and downloads stay on this device.
settings.resetAllMessage: This removes servers, books, downloads, reading progress, and saved passwords from this device. You will start fresh as if {{appName}} was just installed.
settings.resumeLastBookHint: Opens your last book automatically when the app starts.

serverForm.helper: Paste your OPDS feed URL — for Calibre-Web, enable OPDS in admin settings and use {{url}}. Username and password are only needed for private servers.

onboarding.description: {{appName}} is a premium reader for your self-hosted OPDS library. Connect Calibre-Web or any OPDS catalog, download books, and read without distractions.
onboarding.point1Body: Point {{appName}} at your OPDS feed — no public ebook dumps, just your collection.
onboarding.point2Body: Queue downloads and keep your library on device for offline reading.
onboarding.point3Body: Credentials stay on your device. Your library never passes through our servers.
onboarding.connectStep: Step 2 of 2 — link your Calibre-Web or OPDS server.
onboarding.syncBody: Read on your e-reader, pick up where you left off on your phone. Verso syncs seamlessly with KOReader and Calibre-Web Automated.
onboarding.syncPoint1Body: Keep your current location aligned between Verso and KOReader.
onboarding.syncPoint2Body: Calibre-Web Automated can use the same library account you just connected.
onboarding.syncPoint3Body: Skip it now and enable sync later from Settings.

errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check username and password.
errors.noBooksFound: Connected but no books found. Check that OPDS is enabled on your server.

sync.title: KOReader Sync
sync.footer: For Calibre-Web Automated, use your library host (e.g. https://books.example.com) with the same username and password as OPDS — not /kosync in the URL. For sync.koreader.rocks, use your KOReader account password (MD5 auth).
sync.settingsFooter: Resume reading across KOReader, Thorium, and this app.
sync.settingsRowHint: Calibre-Web host or sync.koreader.rocks — same progress as KOReader
sync.useLibraryServerHint: Prefill /kosync URL and credentials from your active OPDS library
sync.documentIdFooter: Partial MD5 matches KOReader default. Filename mode is faster but can collide.
sync.errorCredentials: Enter server URL, username, and password.
sync.conflictMessage: Another device has newer reading progress. Jump to that position or keep reading here?
